core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Finance precision with Swiss Art clarity.
Content is King: Data density must be legible, not overwhelming.
Negative Space: Use whitespace to guide the eye in high-density layouts.
Contrast: Stark Black/White for structure, Twitter Blue for action.
anti_patterns: No 'Inter everywhere' without customization (use tight tracking).
No center-aligned text for data-heavy sections.
No low-contrast gray text for critical data.

typography.installation_instructions: Add 'Geist' font via 'npm install geist' or use Google Fonts for 'Inter' with 'font-feature-settings: "ss01", "ss02"' to mimic the square tech look.

usage_rules: Primary Actions (Buttons, Links, Active States) use Twitter Blue (#1DA1F2).
Typography and Borders use Deep Black (#000000) or very dark gray for high contrast.
Avoid gradients for backgrounds; use solid colors or subtle noise textures.

layout.spacing: Tailwind Scale: p-4, p-6, p-8. Use generous padding inside containers.
layout.container_style: Clean card-based layout with subtle borders (1px solid #E5E7EB). No heavy shadows.

sidebar.navigation: Vertical list with Lucide icons. Active state: bg-secondary text-primary border-r-2 border-primary.

buttons.style: Sharp or slightly rounded (rounded-md). Solid primary color for CTAs. Outline for secondary actions.
buttons.hover: Opacity 90% or slight lift. No massive color shifts.

cards.style: Flat, white background, 1px border. Minimal shadow (shadow-sm).

inputs.style: Flat, 1px border. Focus ring: 2px solid Twitter Blue (#1DA1F2).

tables.style: High-density. Row height: h-10 or h-12. Header: bg-muted/50 text-xs uppercase.

breadcrumbs.style: Text-sm text-muted-foreground. Separator: '/'. Active item: text-foreground font-medium.

login.layout: Split screen or Centered Card on Minimalist Background.
elements: Subtle abstract 3D shape or clean office image in background/side panel.

drhp_builder.features: Document Upload (Drag & Drop), OCR Status, Version Control List.

universal_guidelines: Do not use 'transition: all'. Use specific transitions.
Maintain high contrast for accessibility (WCAG AA).
Use 'Geist' or 'Inter' with tight tracking for that 'Engineering-focused' look.
